framework_name: FDA 21 CFR Part 11 — Electronic Records; Electronic Signatures

controls.title: Validation of systems to ensure accuracy, reliability, consistent intended performance, and the ability to discern invalid or altered records
controls.description: Validation of systems to ensure accuracy, reliability, consistent intended performance, and the ability to discern invalid or altered records

controls.title: Ability to generate accurate and complete copies of records
controls.description: Ability to generate accurate and complete copies of records

controls.title: Protection of records to enable accurate and ready retrieval throughout the retention period
controls.description: Protection of records to enable accurate and ready retrieval throughout the retention period

controls.title: Limiting system access to authorized individuals
controls.description: Limiting system access to authorized individuals

controls.title: Use of secure, computer-generated, time-stamped audit trails
controls.description: Use of secure, computer-generated, time-stamped audit trails

controls.title: Use of operational system checks to enforce permitted sequencing of steps and events
controls.description: Use of operational system checks to enforce permitted sequencing of steps and events

controls.title: Use of authority checks to ensure that only authorized individuals can use the system, electronically sign a record, or perform operations
controls.description: Use of authority checks to ensure that only authorized individuals can use the system, electronically sign a record, or perform operations

controls.title: Use of device checks to determine validity of source of data input or operational instruction
controls.description: Use of device checks to determine validity of source of data input or operational instruction

controls.title: Determination that persons who develop, maintain, or use electronic records/signature systems have the appropriate education, training, and experience
controls.description: Determination that persons who develop, maintain, or use electronic records/signature systems have the appropriate education, training, and experience

controls.title: Establishment of, and adherence to, written policies that hold individuals accountable and responsible for actions initiated under their electronic signatures
controls.description: Establishment of, and adherence to, written policies that hold individuals accountable and responsible for actions initiated under their electronic signatures

controls.title: Use of appropriate controls over systems documentation
controls.description: Use of appropriate controls over systems documentation

controls.title: Controls for Open Systems
controls.description: Controls for Open Systems

controls.title: Signature Manifestations
controls.description: Signature Manifestations

controls.title: Signature/Record Linking
controls.description: Signature/Record Linking

controls.title: Each electronic signature shall be unique to one individual
controls.description: Each electronic signature shall be unique to one individual

controls.title: Verify identity before establishing, assigning, certifying, or sanctioning electronic signatures
controls.description: Verify identity before establishing, assigning, certifying, or sanctioning electronic signatures

controls.title: Certify to FDA that electronic signatures are intended to be the legally binding equivalent of traditional handwritten signatures
controls.description: Certify to FDA that electronic signatures are intended to be the legally binding equivalent of traditional handwritten signatures

controls.title: Electronic signatures not based upon biometrics shall employ at least two distinct identification components (ID + password) and fall under administrative controls
controls.description: Electronic signatures not based upon biometrics shall employ at least two distinct identification components (ID + password) and fall under administrative controls

controls.title: Electronic signatures based upon biometrics shall be designed to ensure that they cannot be used by anyone other than their genuine owners
controls.description: Electronic signatures based upon biometrics shall be designed to ensure that they cannot be used by anyone other than their genuine owners

controls.title: Controls for Identification Codes/Passwords
controls.description: Controls for Identification Codes/Passwords
